name: spin-wheel

en.when_to_use: Use it when you need a decision wheel that can be dragged and flung, decelerates naturally, and stops precisely on a specified item instead of hand-written CSS rotate, which often fails at momentum, hit indexes, weighted sectors, and responsive redraws. Do not use it as a random backend or secure prize-draw decision for anything with cash value.
en.why_valuable: AI can draw a wheel that spins but cannot deliver stable touch flinging, rotation resistance, weighted-sector hit-testing, and easing to a specified index. spin-wheel wraps the complete interaction in native dependency-free canvas.

data_in.note: data_in is a trimmed set of Wheel constructor props, with one item row per sector. If prizes have real value, a trusted backend must determine the winning index; the frontend should only call spinToItem to display the result.

items.label: string
items.value?: any JSON value -- defaults to null
items.backgroundColor?: CSS color string -- defaults to null, falling back to itemBackgroundColors
items.labelColor?: CSS color string -- defaults to null, falling back to itemLabelColors

schema.pointerAngle?: number(deg) -- defaults to 0; the library only calculates pointer angle, so draw the pointer with DOM or overlayImage

spec.note: Wheel creates a canvas in the container and redraws with ResizeObserver. The default container has explicit width 100% and height 420px. vh and percentage heights are forbidden by iron rule 3; the visual square uses the container's shorter side.

when_to_use: 需要可拖拽甩动、带减速手感且能精确停到指定项的决定轮盘时用它,而非手写 CSS rotate——原生手写在动量、命中索引、加权扇区和响应式重绘上经常失败。非做有现金价值的随机后端或安全抽奖判定。
why_valuable: AI 默认只能画出会转的圆盘,做不到稳定的触摸甩动、旋转阻力、加权扇区命中和指定索引缓动;spin-wheel 用无依赖 canvas 原生封装补齐完整手感。

data_in.note: data_in 是 Wheel 构造器的裁剪版 props;items 每行对应一个扇区。若奖品有真实价值,中奖 index 必须由可信后端决定,前端只调用 spinToItem 展示结果。

items.label: string
items.value?: 任意 JSON 值 —— 默认 null
items.backgroundColor?: CSS color string —— 默认 null,回落到 itemBackgroundColors
items.labelColor?: CSS color string —— 默认 null,回落到 itemLabelColors

schema.pointerAngle?: number(deg) —— 默认 0;库只计算指针角,指针图形需由 DOM 或 overlayImage 自绘

spec.note: Wheel 会在容器内建 canvas 并随 ResizeObserver 重绘;默认容器显式 width 100%、height 420px。禁用 vh/百分比高(铁律 3);方形视觉由容器较短边决定。

boot.codex: 同 artifact(sandbox iframe fragment):从 spin-wheel@5/+esm 取 Wheel,创建固定 px 高容器后 new Wheel(el,data);指定落点用原生 spinToItem(index,duration,...)。

example._why: items 行字段、weight 语义和 pointerAngle 容易与别的 wheel 库混淆,minimal 用来钉死本包原生 props。

uplink: local-interact 默认不需上行;若要回传当前 index 或奖品,消费 AI 直接接上游 onRest 并按载体分别实现消息通道,本条不规定统一事件对象。

carriers.widget: supported:canvas 挂进 shadow 容器,ResizeObserver/Pointer Events 可用,无外部 CSS

isolation.evidence: src/events.js: uses ResizeObserver on the canvas container via util.getResizeObserver (element-scoped — confirms catalog note) + a window.matchMedia('(resolution:...)') 'change' listener for devicePixelRatio. Drag = canvas.setPointerCapture with pointer listeners on the canvas; mouse fallback adds document mousemove/mouseup that self-remove on mouseup. unregister()/remove() removes canvas listeners, stops the ResizeObserver, and removes the matchMedia listener → no leak IF teardown calls wheel.remove(). Canvas appended to the supplied container; nothing to body/head.
